subject: fix(ui): replace solid primary bubble with subtle tinted surface
body:
Own message bubbles were solid hot pink (#f861b4) — visually overwhelming
for prolonged chatting. Now uses withAlpha(primary, 0.15) for a subtle
pink-tinted dark surface with a withAlpha(primary, 0.3) border.

All inner elements updated for the dark tinted surface:
- Message text: primaryContent → baseContent (light, readable)
- Timestamp/edited: primaryContent → baseContent at reduced opacity
- Status checkmarks: read uses primary (pink pop), unread uses muted baseContent
- Tone tag overlay: primaryContent → primary at 20% opacity
- Added subtle primary border to define bubble edges

ReplyReference made context-aware with isOwn prop:
- Own bubble: withAlpha(primary, 0.15) fill with primary left border
- Received bubble: withAlpha(baseContent, 0.08) fill with primary left border

Tags: ui, theme, chat
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: uniwind-migration
Semver: minor

title: replace solid primary bubble with subtle tinted surface
